brief_html: A client sends this to another client to gain information about self when connected.
format:
(UINT32) Player Counter
(UINT32) Unknown (0)
(UINT8) Player number
(UINT8)[5] Unknown
remarks_html:
A client sends this to another client to gain information about self when connected.

The first byte in the second unknown is possibly the status of the player.

Packet Log:

F7 37 12 00
02 00 00 00
00 00 00 00
06
FF 5E 00 00 00

comments.content_html: Is there anything known about the Player Counter field? How is it generated? Simply it somehow does not justify its name
